transcript.text:
May I ask how old you are?
(If you're born in 1937...) I was born in 1937
(87 years old)
(87-year-old owner's 20-year-old traditional mul-dakgalbi)
I've never seen anyone eat one whole chicken
I've only seen it once in my 20 years of my career
(Then what about two whole chickens?!)
(Could there be...?) I eat quite a lot
(Today's mukbang is mul-dakgalbi*) *Taebaek style spicy stir-fried chicken stew
(The name is also unfamiliar... what about the taste?)
(Eyes wide open) It's delicious
(Mul-dakgalbi tastes good by itself...)
(Adding ramyun) My heart is pounding
(Still not enough...?)
(Mul-dakgalbi’s finale, the fried rice!) One rice, please...
(She eats even more...)

(A heart-warming alley in Sangdo-dong)
Hello, everyone
I'm here today
in Sangdo-dong
to eat mul-dakgalbi
(Unfamiliar food of Taebaek...!) Mul-dakgalbi is special to Taebaek
I never tried it, so I came to try it out of curiosity
This place is 20 years old!
(Dongjak-gu, Sangdo-dong) 'Stunning Mul-dakgalbi’
It definitely has the vibe of a 20-year-old place...!
(Entering) Hello
Here's the menu
But they don’t have mul-dakgalbi!
Eolssigu... Jolssigu...?* *Means ‘yippee & whoopee’ in Korean
Small, medium, large!
- Oh, that's small, medium, and large? - Yes

Eolssigu is half-sized chicken, Jolssigu is more than half, and Jihwaja* is a whole chicken *Means ‘hurray’ in Korean
Can I have two large...?
(The record is one large out of the 20 years...) I've never seen anyone eat one whole chicken
Oh really? Is one that big?
(Of course) One whole chicken is huge
I've only seen it once
One person eating a whole chicken!
(Happened once in her 20-year-history...) I've only seen it once in my 20 years of my career
Then I'm...
(Breaking record) going to have two!!
- Two whole chickens? - Two large ones, please
(Disbelief) You can add more later
Tzuyang can finish it!
(For reals?)
I eat quite a lot haha
(Okay)

I'll have one spicy
and one original
- May I ask how old you are? - I was born in 1937!
(87 years old?!)
Really? You look so well though
Thank you for the food!
You have to eat it deliciously!
(Thanks for the hard work) I should thank you
(Food is served)
(That portion is definitely worth a hurray...) That's a lot of food, thank you
Thank you, is this the spicy one?
- (Can you finish it...?) - Wow, but the ingredients are like plain dakgalbi
It's like it's stir-fried
But there's broth here
Like dakbokkeumtang* *Spicy braised chicken
It comes out like this, so cool

(We think you're the cool one...)
Why are these diced radish so good?
Do they sell these separately?!
(I want to take you home...) It's so delicious
It's totally my taste
(Mul-dakgalbi that sounds and looks unfamiliar...)
It’s like dakgalbi ingredients with a bit of
broth that is poured like this, right?
The meat was soaked in seasoning
It's been maintained for the Taebaek miners in the old days
You have to have soup to share the food
(Back when we used to share even a bit of food...!) It was a time when meat was not enough to fill you up
So they had soup together
It's been here for quite a long time, right?
It's been over 90 years..!
(Mul-dakgalbi has a long history) Wow, that color looks amazing

Should I try a little bit of the broth?
Wow, this is a bit like...
I thought it’ll taste like dakbokkeumtang
It's completely different
Dakbokkeumtang is a bit like
thick in texture, but this one
taste like a refreshing soup dish
(The taste that calls for a drink...) This is a perfect pairing for a drink...
It tastes quite savory
It tastes a bit bland, so I keep going for it
It's addictive
Wow, it's delicious
It's getting tastier!
The more I eat, the more delicious it gets
Maybe the more it's boiled, the more delicious it gets
- Can I eat the rice cakes? - Yes!

(The owner is laying it out for her to eat haha)
The rice cakes are really chubby!
Wow, it's my favorite flour rice cakes
I usually like original rice cakes
But I really like these flour rice cakes
They're chewy in texture
and also soft, you know?
Wow, it's delicious
It's that chewy flour rice cake!
It tastes completely different from dakgalbi and dakbokkeumtang
The soup is very clear
The first time I ate it, I was like,
'Uh, it tastes a little bland?'
(The more you eat, the richer it gets..!) The more you eat it, the more delicious it tastes
I think I can eat it now
They all have bones on them!

Oh, this is chicken breast!
Should l try this one first?
Oops, it's hot! Oh?!
It's chewy!
The chicken is so chewy, so good!
The meat is so plump and chewy!
That’s so cool
How's the meat so...
(A special texture that's hard to explain!) plump and chewy?
The chicken is very finely chopped
so there's a lot of them
(Eating multiple times makes you feel fuller?) Isn't there something different about
eating in pieces and eating as a whole?
(The big eater's secret to emotional fullness haha) So I deliberately cut it in pieces if the portion is not enough
Then it looks like a lot of food
So good!

When it comes to dakgalbi,
it sounds like it will be busy
in lunchtime, right?
But this place is busy at night!
But once I tried it, I get why
(Soju is a must) This must be paired with a drink
- Dip it in this sauce, it tastes better - Really?!
(Oh right, there was a sauce!) Do I have to dip it in the sauce? I totally forgot about it
(Dip)
(How’s it?)
- Tell me if you need more! - Thank you haha
Wow... Delicious!
It tastes a bit like the meat sauce
It tastes better than I thought
Potato!!
My favorite

(Potatoes are always heartwarming...) Wow, so good
(He’s a fan of her, so he’s giving a gift...) Seriously? This is so precious...
It's a wild ginseng alcohol
Wild ginseng?
- (Of course) - Can I really have this?
- I don't think you're old enough to drink it yet - Oh my...
(He's basically asking for it haha)
I'll enjoy it, thank you
(Score) Wow, amazing!
There is a very tender meat
There is also meat that looks like chicken breast
but if I taste it,
it isn't tough, but rather chewy!
Let's take out a lot of the chicken
(Let's add the extra ramyun noodles...) I'll get ready to eat the ramyun...
(Ramyun goes in) Wow, thank you

(Koreans can't resist ramyun noodles...) This is already seasoned
Thank you
(Ramyun noodles that can't be left out in a delicious broth) It's so crazy, the ramyun is perfectly cooked
My heart is pounding
Ramyun full of excitement!
I can see why they sell ramyun noodles
This goes very well with it
Like kimchi stew!
(Ramyun noodles that are not thick and easy to eat) It's not thick, so the ramyun goes well with it
The potatoes are perfectly cooked
(Come on) Let's grab some of it
Amazing!
(Did she eat the whole chicken...?)
She's not even big in size...
(Seriously...?)
(How spicy would it be?) I'll try the spicy one now!

It's just not that spicy!
It's spicy...
The taste is completely different!
In terms of taste,
I prefer the original flavor
But if you like spicy food, I think you'll love this one as well
This is so spicy and nice
It's super spicy, but it's really nice
It's the right level of spice to relieve stress comfortably
(Still hard for her to take the spiciness) My tongue stings
Ahhh
(It's spicy...)
(After all...)
(when it's too spicy...)
Only one rice...
please...!!

You want to fry one rice?!
Yes, just one bowl of rice, please!
You also had ramyun...
(Is she okay...?)
(Adds the rice)
(Quite unordinary frying skills...)
(A fried rice field unfolds in no time)
(You can feel the expertise from the fried rice..) It spreads so thin and wide, wow!
(Done!)
(Fried rice that’s cooked evenly tastes better) How did you spread it so quickly?
It's so amazing
It happened in no time
Whoosh
(Making fried rice... is easy, right?) That's how it spread out
(Finely chop the leftover chicken as well) Let's cut it up finely
I'll try it

Cauldron fried rice!
Amazing
(Be careful not to hurt the roof of your mouth)
Let's pour a little broth
(She eats so well...)
More potatoes
(Adds the potato)
(AKA 'fried rice with a lot of potatoes') I like fried rice with lots of potatoes
(Fried rice with a bunch of potatoes)
This is it! It's going to be really delicious
It's so delicious...
Wow, it's so good
When making shabu-shabu porridge,
I always mash the potatoes like this
I have to add as much seasoning as the potatoes, or
add less rice or something

Why am I not full?!
(What...?)
Think carefully again...
(Measuring her stomach capacity)
(Less than acceptable) I don't think it's full
If I eat something strong and stimulating,
I tend to get sick of it easily
But if food tastes bland from the beginning like this,
like, 'Oh, is it a bit bland...?'
(Endless loop of savory flavors!) Then I can eat endlessly
(Endless loop of savory flavors!) because it gets more delicious the more I eat it
Should I say it's addictive?
(Empty)
(Done) Wow, I had a very nice meal
(She really finished it...)
- Did you enjoy it? - Yes, I ate so well!

I really enjoyed it haha
I think I can still eat one more
(I'll just laugh...)
I really enjoyed the food haha
(May you be happy and healthy!) Stay healthy and I will come back next time to eat again
- Thank you for enjoying it haha - No, I'm grateful haha
Once again,
thank you for the great meal
(Shy)
(Celebrating the first record in 20 years)
